word: H7428 - רִמֹּן פֶּרֶץ - Rimmôn Perets - rim-mone' peh'-rets - Rimmon-parez

sections.paragraph:
Original: רמּן פּרץ

Transliteration: rimmôn perets

Phonetic: rim-mone' peh'-rets

BDB Definition:

Rimmon-parez = "pomegranate of the breach"
  1. a station of Israel in the wilderness

Origin: from H7416 and H6556

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
